chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-805 of 2016. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For hearing of main case. 18.01.2022 Mr. Ghulam Dastagir Shahani, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl.A.G Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = At very outset, it is stated by learned Addl.A.G Sindh on behalf of the official respondents that on verification of share list, if the petitioners are found to be share holders on the subject water-course, then they would be provided due share of water, in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with statement of learned Addl.A.G Sindh does not press the instant constitutional petition, it is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE.
